page_metadata.biotools__summary: BRANEnet is  a novel multi-omics integration framework for multilayer heterogeneous networks. In particular, it embeds graph-based information from multi-omics data in a lower-dimensional space.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BRANEnet is  a novel multi-omics integration framework for multilayer heterogeneous networks. In particular, it embeds graph-based information from multi-omics data in a lower-dimensional space.
